name: Ulcerative Colitis - Diagnosis Code Query
description: Tests ability to find UC patients by SNOMED diagnosis code. UC is a chronic inflammatory bowel disease distinct from Crohn's disease.
prompt: Find all patients with a diagnosis of ulcerative colitis.

prompts.broad: Find patients diagnosed with ulcerative colitis — a chronic inflammatory bowel disease affecting the colon and rectum.
prompts.expert: Search Condition resources for SNOMED 64766004 (ulcerative colitis). Query: Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|64766004
